reference: Hello. I have reviewed your question and understand your concern. The only cause that a lumbar puncture can lead to paraplegia is lumbar epidural hematoma, which is caused by the lumbar puncture. You should immediately have a lumbar magnetic resonance imaging to rule out this eventuality. I hope this helps.
text: Hello, I have reviewed your question and understand your concern. The only cause that a lumbar puncture can lead to paraplesia is lumbar epidural hematoma, which is caused by the lumbar puncture; you should immediately have a lumbar magnetic resonance imaging to rule out this eventuality. I hope this helps.
